title: Crispy Umami Tunisian Chickpea Chocolate Bowl
description: A sweet‑savory, crunchy snack that blends roasted chickpeas with tempered dark chocolate for an energizing burst of flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 °C (400 °F). Pat the chickpeas dry with a paper towel.
Toss the chickpeas with olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, and ½ teaspoon of sea salt until evenly coated. Spread them in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast for 20 minutes, stirring halfway through, until the chickpeas are golden and crunchy. Remove and let cool to room temperature.

While the chickpeas roast, temper the chocolate: melt 30 g of chocolate chips in 20‑second bursts in the microwave, stirring between each burst. Once melted, let it cool to about 45 °C while stirring. Add the remaining 30 g of chocolate chips and maple syrup, stirring until smooth.

In a bowl, combine the roasted chickpeas, toasted sesame seeds, and the remaining ½ teaspoon of sea salt. Drizzle the tempered chocolate over the chickpeas and toss until each piece is lightly coated.
Serve the bowl at room temperature or slightly warmed. Sprinkle with unsweetened cocoa powder and garnish with chopped cilantro.
Enjoy the umami kick and chocolate warmth of this Tunisian‑inspired snack!
